_note: WorkRail cannot register live cron jobs. This file is a configuration document for the operator to configure monitoring alerts and calendar reminders based on the triggers listed here.

time_based_triggers.action: full re-run of wr.competitive-analysis from step 0
time_based_triggers.rationale: OpenClaw ships daily. Architecture and strategic signals can shift significantly in 90 days.

time_based_triggers.action: re-run subagents 2a (product surface) and 2d (strategy signals) only; update 03_evidence_base.json if new shipped features found
time_based_triggers.rationale: Daily CalVer releases mean the product surface changes fast. Monthly spot-check catches new shipped features without full re-run cost.

event_based_triggers.trigger: skills/coding-agent/ directory contents change materially in openclaw/openclaw main branch
event_based_triggers.monitoring: watch https://github.com/openclaw/openclaw/tree/main/skills/coding-agent -- check for step enforcement logic, typed phase contracts, or workflow definitions
event_based_triggers.action: immediately re-run steps 5-7 (synthesis → red hat → decision artifacts); escalate coding-agent and distribution-gap findings to urgent
event_based_triggers.priority: HIGH -- this is the single most important event trigger from the current analysis
event_based_triggers.rationale: The synthesis's most-likely premortem scenario activates if this directory gains multi-phase step enforcement. Changes the competitive timeline from 'watch closely' to 'act now'.

event_based_triggers.trigger: GitHub, OpenAI, or any other sponsor announces acquisition of openclaw org or steipete
event_based_triggers.action: full re-run immediately; threat level escalates from 'architectural library' to 'platform threat'

event_based_triggers.trigger: OpenClaw releases a version tagged with a major feature announcement for autonomous coding / dev pipeline capability
OpenClaw announces a funding round (Series A or later) from a strategic investor
event_based_triggers.action: re-run steps 5-7 with updated commercial framing; reconsider stay_community commercial threat verdict

event_based_triggers.trigger: steipete leaves the project or a new lead contributor with a different architectural philosophy emerges
event_based_triggers.action: re-read VISION.md; re-run step 5 threat read; E11 (hierarchy rejection) verdict may flip
event_based_triggers.rationale: Current governance is extremely concentrated. A leadership change could reverse the 'will not merge agent-hierarchy' stance quickly.

event_based_triggers.trigger: WorkTrain team is about to make a roadmap decision that this analysis was meant to inform (e.g. prioritizing ContextEngine vs worktrain doctor vs trajectory schema)
event_based_triggers.action: re-read 07_decision_ledger.md; verify urgent items have not been superseded by new evidence

open_questions_for_next_run: What are the contents of skills/coding-agent/? Is it a flat agent prompt or does it contain multi-phase step enforcement?
Has OpenClaw shipped any ClawHub plugin that adds structured coding pipeline execution?
Have any of the three urgent items (ContextEngine, unified trajectory, worktrain doctor) been addressed in WorkTrain by re-run time?
Are there documented examples of WorkTrain's typed-phase contracts catching failures that a flat agent would have missed? (ACH Alternative B -- currently unsupported)
